zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Margaret Montgomery於1487年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧時，她的父親Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie27歲，母親Lady Helen Campbell27歲。她於1501年3月13日與William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年2月12日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾雷福盧享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Margaret Montgomery于1487年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie27岁，母亲Lady Helen Campbell27岁。她于1501年3月13日与William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年2月12日在苏格兰雷福福爾雷福盧享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾艾格林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Margaret Montgomery was born in 1487, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, was 27 and her mother, Lady Helen Campbell, was 27. She married William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill on 13 March 1501, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 February 1523, in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 36, and was buried in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Margaret Montgomery est née en 1487, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Helen Campbell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill le 13 mars 1501, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1523, à Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Eglinton, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Margaret Montgomery 1487 in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Helen Campbell 27. Sie hat am 13. März 1501 in Edinburgh, Scotland William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1523 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Margaret Montgomery è nata il nel 1487 nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Helen Campbell, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill il 13 marzo 1501, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1523, nel Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Montgomeryが1487年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerieは27歳，母Lady Helen Campbellは27歳であった。1501年3月13日にスコットランドエディンブルグでWilliam Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年2月12日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアレンフリューで36歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Montgomery(이)가 1487년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Helen Campbell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1501년 3월 13일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 2월 12일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 렌프레에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Margaret Montgomery nasceu em 1487, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Helen Campbell, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill em 13 de março de 1501, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1523, em Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Margaret Montgomery родилась в 1487 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Helen Campbell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill 13 марта 1501 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 февраля 1523 г. в местности ренфрю, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности эглинтон, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Margaret Montgomery nació en 1487, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Helen Campbell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill el 13 de marzo de 1501, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1523, en Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland.
